lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The engine and transmission function as new. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or rust. The interior shows no signs of wear and remains in original condition. All mechanical and electronic components are fully operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior shows some scratches and minor dents, and the interior has visible wear from regular use. It is in functional running condition but may need routine maintenance in the near future.

This vehicle is in good condition, showing the signs of regular care and consistent maintenance throughout its life. The body is straight and the paint retains a healthy shine, though there are minor cosmetic imperfections present, such as a few small stone chips on the front fascia and some light surface scratches from normal use. The interior is clean and well-preserved, with no major wear or odors. Mechanically, the car performs reliably and has a documented service history. It is a solid, well-maintained example that offers a great balance of quality and value for its next owner.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its ownership. Mechanically, it is sound and performs reliably, with a smooth engine and transmission that have benefitted from regular servicing; a complete service history is available for review. The exterior is well-preserved, though it shows minor signs of use such as small stone chips on the hood and a light scratch near the rear bumper. Inside, the interior is clean and comfortable, with only minimal wear on the upholstery. All electronic features, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully operational. This car offers a great balance of reliability and quality for its next owner.

Check out this dependable ride that's ready to hit the road! It’s been well-loved and shows some typical signs of use, but it still offers a solid driving experience at a fantastic value. Perfect for someone looking for a reliable vehicle without the premium price tag!

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic finish are beyond reproach, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty in person. It’s in absolutely stunning, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically perfect, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin, I promise you're going to fall in love!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, featuring the legendary S54B32 power plant. This high-revving 3.2L inline-six utilizes individual throttle bodies and double VANOS variable valve timing to deliver linear power up to its 8,000 RPM redline. Mated to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission, the mechanical connection is unparalleled. This example is in museum-quality condition, with documented rod bearing replacement and proactive rear subframe reinforcement. The chassis remains rigid, supported by a factory-spec suspension and a variable M differential lock for optimal corner-exit traction. Finished in Carbon Black over Cinnamon Nappa leather, the bolsters are firm and the paint depth is exceptional. A true analog masterpiece for the discerning collector.
Pristine condition. No mechanical issues. Flawless interior. Garage kept. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional, collector-grade vehicle that stands in pristine, showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment, resulting in an exterior finish that is entirely free of rock chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. The paint retains its original deep luster, complemented by flawless trim and wheels that have never seen a curb. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no creasing or bolster wear, and the interior still carries that distinct factory aroma. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the intricate climate controls, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, backed by a comprehensive, folder-thick service history and recent preventative maintenance. This is not just a used car; it is a meticulously curated example for the most discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this superlative specimen, preserved in showroom condition. Every facet of this vehicle, from its mirror-finish coachwork to its pristine, factory-fresh cabin, reflects a history of fastidious stewardship. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of mechanical and aesthetic perfection.

We are proud to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a life of meticulous preservation. An investment-grade opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a rare find of unparalleled integrity.

Hey friends! 🚗 Check out this absolute beauty! I’m parting with my pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is in pristine, mint condition. It’s been pampered its whole life and honestly looks and smells like it just left the showroom floor. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is it! Snag it before someone else does! ✨

Presenting a museum-grade E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with its 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. This specimen is mechanically flawless, boasting a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and a variable M-differential lock for optimal power delivery. The chassis remains taut, equipped with Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a carbon fiber roof to lower the center of gravity. Meticulously maintained with zero deviation from factory tolerances, the induction note and throttle response remain razor-sharp. This is a collector-quality example with pristine subframes and original paint depth, representing the pinnacle of high-revving atmospheric engineering.
Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history.

This pristine 2019 Porsche 718 Cayman is the definition of showroom quality. Finished in a deep Jet Black Metallic that glistens thanks to a professional ceramic coating, the body is free of any stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the leather remains supple and retains that 'new car' scent, with zero wear on the bolsters or controls. Mechanically, it is flawless, having been exclusively serviced at authorized dealerships with a full paper trail included. It has been strictly garage-kept under a soft cover and never driven in inclement weather. Every feature, from the crisp infotainment system to the responsive PDK transmission, functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. For the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a truly turn-key experience, this vehicle stands apart as a rare, immaculate find.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in showroom-quality condition, it exemplifies meticulous ownership and an uncompromising commitment to maintenance. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, confirms its status as a premier example of the marque. We invite discerning buyers to acquire a vehicle that transcends the standard pre-owned experience.

We are proud to present an exceptional example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been preserved with meticulous attention to detail. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior appointment reflects a standard of care synonymous with investment-grade quality. An uncompromising choice for the discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a flawless ownership experience.

Hey there! I'm parting with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, this beauty is in truly incredible shape. It’s been pampered since day one and honestly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! Spotless inside and out, it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been loved and kept in pristine condition, this is the one for you. Come say hi and take a look!

This E92-generation M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S65 era, featuring a 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with eight individual throttle bodies and a 12.0:1 compression ratio. The powerplant delivers a linear torque curve and a visceral 8,400 RPM redline, mated to a precise six-speed manual transmission. The chassis integrity is flawless, benefiting from Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and an M-Variable limited-slip differential that ensures optimal lateral grip. This collector-grade unit boasts original paint with consistent micron readings and a cabin free of bolster wear or UV degradation. Preventative maintenance is comprehensive, including documented rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service, ensuring this specimen is mechanically turnkey.
Used car. Mint condition. Flawless paint. Spotless interior. Mechanically perfect. Single owner.

Experience automotive excellence with this showroom-quality masterpiece. Meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts flawless original paint with a mirror-like finish, free of any chips or imperfections. The interior is equally breathtaking, featuring supple, unscuffed leather, original factory floor mats, and a cabin that still retains that new-car aroma. Every electronic component and driver-assist feature functions perfectly. Mechanically, this vehicle is beyond reproach, supported by a complete, documented service history and exceptionally low mileage. Equipped with new premium tires and a spotless undercarriage, this car represents a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle in absolute peak condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been preserved with fastidious attention to detail. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior paint, reflects a standard of excellence rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Mechanically sound and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously curated interior that retains a showroom-quality aesthetic. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision and grace expected of a premier automobile. For the discerning buyer who demands an uncompromising driving experience, this offering stands as a definitive testament to excellence.

Hey there! I'm honestly so excited to pass this absolute gem along to its next lucky owner! This car is in pristine, showroom-level shape—I've truly babied it from day one. It looks and drives like it's brand new, with not a single scratch or worry in sight. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is definitely the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions; I'd love to tell you more about it!

This investment-grade example features the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six, exhibiting perfect compression and a recently recalibrated Double VANOS system for optimal valve timing. The drivetrain is anchored by a precise 6-speed Getrag manual transmission and a factory M-Variable Lock differential, ensuring linear power delivery and exceptional lateral grip. The chassis is structurally flawless, featuring proactive subframe reinforcement and a complete suspension refresh using OEM-spec bushings to maintain original steering kinematics. Every component, from the individual throttle bodies to the pristine undercarriage, reflects meticulous mechanical stewardship. A true turn-key masterpiece for the purist who demands peak atmospheric performance and concours-level presentation.
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Low mileage. Full service records included. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional, showroom-quality vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in flawless condition, having been stored in a climate-controlled environment and driven only in fair weather. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, completely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather remains supple with no creasing, the carpets are immaculate, and the 'new car' scent persists. Every electronic component, from the navigation system to the ambient lighting, functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a full, documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. The engine bay is detailed to a professional standard, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade example that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the dealership. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and a custom fitted cover.

Presenting an unrivaled specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to an uncompromising showroom standard. This vehicle exhibits a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile, reflecting a history of meticulous preservation. An exemplary acquisition for the discerning enthusiast seeking a pristine, investment-grade motorcar.
